title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at ICAT Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at ICAT Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? ICAT Holdings Services in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ICAT Holdings Services:
ICAT Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT Holdings Services!
